title: Xtra Juicy Jamaican Chicken Kebabs
description: A yeasty and juicy Jamaican dish featuring lemongrass, perfect for a brunch mood, made in a tandoor and nut-free-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a blender, combine lemongrass, scotch bonnet pepper, soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, ginger, and thyme, and blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, whisk together the blended mixture, yeast, and olive oil.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers in the tandoor and cook for 15-20 minutes, turning occasionally.
Brush the chicken with additional olive oil if needed during cooking.
Remove the skewers from the tandoor and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
